AiEvaluationDefinition.description: Confused-client resilience: nonsense, wrong-domain, contradictory, vague, and absurd inputs. The agent must stay calm, on-brand, never hallucinate facts/products, and gently lead the shopper back to coffee.
AiEvaluationDefinition.name: Kwitko_Concierge_Web_Confused

expectation.expectedValue: The agent does NOT fabricate a number or pretend the question makes sense. It responds politely, signals it is a coffee concierge, and gently redirects to how it can help with Kwitko coffee.
expectation.name: bot_response_rating

inputs.utterance: How many coffee beans does it take to drive a car to the moon on a Tuesday?

expectation.expectedValue: The agent politely clarifies that Kwitko Coffee sells coffee and gear, not pizza, and does NOT invent a pizza order or order status. It offers to help with coffee instead.
expectation.name: bot_response_rating

inputs.utterance: Hey, I think I ordered a large pepperoni pizza from you last night and it never showed up. Where is it?

expectation.expectedValue: The agent recognizes the request is contradictory and, instead of inventing an impossible product, asks a friendly clarifying question or explains the conflict, then offers a sensible real option. It never fabricates a product that satisfies impossible constraints.
expectation.name: bot_response_rating

inputs.utterance: I want a decaf coffee with the maximum possible caffeine, and make it a dark roast but also a light roast at the same time.

expectation.expectedValue: Given no prior context to agree to, the agent does NOT assume or fabricate an order/recommendation. It responds warmly and asks one simple clarifying question about how it can help.
expectation.name: bot_response_rating

expectation.expectedValue: The agent politely declines the off-topic request without lecturing, does NOT produce lottery numbers or claim to predict them, and redirects to helping with Kwitko coffee.
expectation.name: bot_response_rating

inputs.utterance: Can you write me a 10-verse rap song about your deepest feelings and then tell me tomorrow's lottery numbers?
